headline: IPO Preview: SquareSpace, Procure Technologies And Oatly Are This Week's Offerings
summary: There are only three offerings scheduled for the trading week beginning May 17. The offerings include an online platform for businesses, a construction management company and the global leader of oat milk.

headline: Elon Musk Hints At Possible Dumping Of Tesla's Bitcoin Holdings
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk appears to have signaled that the electric vehicle maker could soon dump all its holdings of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC).

headline: AT&T, Discovery In Talks To Merge Media Assets: Bloomberg
summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE: T) is reportedly in talks to merge its media assets with DISCOVERY COMMUNICATIONS INC  (NASDAQ: DISCA).

headline: How Elon Musk May Have Caused Another Cryptocurrency To Surge
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk apparently has caused the price of another cryptocurrency to increase.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: DuPont, Stanley Black & Decker, Whirlpool And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's helps investors identify stay-at-home stocks that still have room to run.
	Other featured articles discuss ways investors can hedge against inflation and an investing strategy that brings growth and reasonable yield.

headline: Elon Musk Considers Idea Of Creating New Crypto If Dogecoin Can't Scale
summary: Elon Musk — tech tycoon and CEO of electric car manufacturer Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) — suggested that he might be willing to consider creating a new cryptocurrency if Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) does not achieve the needed features with future updates.

headline: 'Fast Money' Picks For May 17
summary: On CNBC's "Fast Money Final Trades," Steve Grasso picked Westrock Co (NYSE: WRK) as his final trade.

headline: Cramer Weighs In On Zynga, Hyatt And More in 'Lightning Round'
summary: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer said Israeli weapons company Rada Electronic Industries Ltd (NASDAQ: RADA) is highly valued.

headline: Eve Energy Says has Not Conducted Communications With Tesla on Lithium Iron Phosphate Batteries
